source_request: Plan GitHub issue #2: Define Kontour Console V0 Projection Read Model.

criteria.description: Projection envelope and object types are documented.
criteria.notes: PASS: docs/specs/projection-schema.md documents KontourConsoleProjection and ProjectionProvenance plus typed object sections for summary, claims, processes, gates, reviewItems, evidence, decisions, actions, exceptions, links, and extensions.

criteria.description: The relationship between event stream and projection snapshot is explicit.
criteria.notes: PASS: docs/specs/projection-schema.md documents deterministic event folding, required derivedFrom provenance, stream identity, last accepted event, comparable sequence, accepted event count, directSnapshot provenance, snapshot_plus_events, and direct snapshot fallback boundaries.

criteria.description: The projection schema can represent the Campfit mapping example.
criteria.notes: PASS: docs/examples/projections/campfit-field-review.json parses and shows Campfit provider_field, Surface claim, Flow process/gate, Campfit review item, evidence, decision/action, and links.

criteria.description: The projection schema can represent Surface current claim status independent of run picker state.
criteria.notes: PASS: docs/examples/projections/surface-current-claim-status.json parses and shows current Surface claim status/freshness/validity timestamps renderable without selected Flow run while retaining optional Flow action/definition and evidence links.

goal_fit.summary: PASS: Implemented in docs/specs plus docs/examples/projections and workflow artifacts only. No reducer, UI, hosted cache/storage, hosted ingestion, adapters, product code, or action execution were added.
